layman_headline: Crypto market is gripped by extreme fear — patience beats impulse right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in 'Extreme Fear' mode, with altcoins bleeding billions in value over the past week. Bitcoin is holding around $64,000 but dominance is high at 56.4%, meaning money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin for safety. None of the swing trade candidates present a clean, high-confidence setup — most are either in confirmed downtrends or have already bounced too far to offer good risk/reward. The best approach right now is to wait for fear to stabilize and for clearer technical setups to form.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines for now. Keep cash ready. If Ethereum drops to $1,800 support and holds with a strong bounce candle, that could be a better entry point in the next day or two.
expert_reasoning: All swing candidates have significant flaws. BONK is in freefall with a -2.0 chart bias and Three Black Crows — catching that knife is reckless. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI at 59 and +18% in 7 days means the easy gains are done and risk/reward is only 0.38x. VVV surged 12.8% today but is below all MAs with a slightly bearish chart. ETH is the most interesting — RSI at 39 (our highest-reliability signal at 80% win rate), clear $1,800 support, and Blockworks notes an ETH derivatives reset. However, the chart bias is -0.70 with price below all MAs, so I need confirmation of support holding before committing capital. In extreme fear environments, premature entries get punished. Better to wait for $1,800 to be tested and defended.
risk_factors: CryptoSlate warns Bitcoin must defend $62,500 — a BTC breakdown would drag all alts down sharply
BTC dominance at 56.4% and rising means capital continues rotating out of altcoins
Fear & Greed at 25 and worsening — extreme fear can persist for weeks before reversing
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — watch for a hammer or bullish engulfing candle on the daily
Bitcoin defense of $62,500 level flagged by CryptoSlate — a break below invalidates all alt setups
Fear & Greed index — any stabilization or uptick above 30 would signal improving conditions for entry
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100, worsening), with altcoins shedding $8.8 billion in a week while BTC dominance climbs to 56.4%. This is a defensive environment where cash preservation outweighs speculative entries.
context_banner: Extreme fear and rising BTC dominance make this a patience-first market — no high-conviction swing entries until support levels are confirmed.

key_signals.description: ETH RSI at 39.4 approaching oversold territory — historically our most reliable signal (80% win rate) — but chart structure is still bearish, warranting patience.
Fear & Greed at 25 and worsening week-over-week — extreme fear can present opportunities but also signals risk of further capitulation.
Bitcoin must defend $62,500 as altcoins lose $8.8B in a week — this critical BTC level defines the floor for all alt swing trades.
ETH derivatives reset noted — reduced leverage in ETH futures could set up a cleaner rally if spot demand returns.
Best candidate LDO shows Three White Soldiers (+0.85 bias) but R/R is only 0.38x; BONK shows Three Black Crows (-2.0 bias) confirming freefall — no clean setups available.
